LLM Stats Report

Published: May 19, 2026

This report covers the latest statistics and benchmarks for large language models. We analyze performance metrics, cost efficiency, and capability comparisons across the major model families. This data is collected from public benchmarks and our own evaluation suite running weekly across all major providers.

The numbers this week show continued improvements in reasoning and coding benchmarks while inference costs continue to decline across all providers. Multimodal capabilities are also expanding rapidly with new vision and audio models shipping regularly now.
